summary: Bedtime Story Builder bug fix verified - NO false 'Generation failed' toast appears after successful story generation. All backend APIs working (config, generate, track, admin/metrics). Frontend renders correctly with all features functional.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: setCredits was replaced with refreshCredits (CreditContext only exports refreshCredits)
BUG FIX VERIFIED: Credit null check now uses creditsLoaded && credits !== null && credits < 10

BUG FIX VERIFIED: Try/catch split - main generation has isolated error handling, post-success operations (streak, tracking, credit refresh) have separate error handling that NEVER shows 'Generation failed'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bedtime Story Builder bug fix verified. The false 'Generation failed' toast bug is FIXED. Root causes were: 1) setCredits was used but CreditContext only exports refreshCredits, 2) credits starting as null caused silent blocking, 3) try/catch was too broad. All fixed by splitting try/catch and using refreshCredits. Backend tests: 30/30 passed (17 from iteration_403 + 13 new). Frontend tests: All features working - story generation, success toast, no error toast, bedtime mode, copy, download, new story, remix variants, streak badge.

details: Returns {success: true, story: {title, scenes}, credits_used, remaining_credits}
No error fields in success response
Accepts valid event types: story_generated, play_clicked, bedtime_mode_enabled, remix_clicked, session_started, session_returned
Requires admin role (403 for regular users)
Returns event counts for all 6 event types
Story result with scenes renders after completion
No error toast appears alongside successful story
Scene types: OPENING, ADVENTURE, CHALLENGE, RESOLUTION, CALM END
SFX cues and voice hints shown
Animal Version, Space Version, Funny Version, Extra Sleepy buttons visible

tests: NO false error toast - PASSED (BUG FIX VERIFIED)

mocked_apis.Web Speech API: Browser-native SpeechSynthesisUtterance - not a real TTS service

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: False 'Generation failed' toast appeared after successful story generation
root_causes: setCredits was destructured from useCredits() but CreditContext only exports refreshCredits - calling it crashed
credits starts as null, and (null ?? 0) < 10 = true silently blocked generation
try/catch was too broad - tracking/streak failures inside same try/catch as generation could poison success path
fixes_applied: Fixed credit null check to only block when creditsLoaded is true
Split try/catch to isolate main generation from post-success side effects
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - No false error toast appears after successful generation
